education.institution: California State University, Fullerton, Mihaylo College of Business and Economics

experience.title: Director of Information Technology
experience.description: Managing the day-to-day responsibilities of a 24x7x365 IT organization, designing and deploying the first data center, creating cyber security policies and controls, and putting together a team to support the data center and provide technical support for the new product offering.

experience.title: Information Technology Manager
experience.description: Managing a project support team, supervising network administrators, evaluating security risks, and ensuring HITECH/HIPAA protocol were followed.

experience.title: Information Technology Manager
experience.description: Managing the overall management, infrastructure, and strategic planning of the National point of sale network, managing the ERP solution, and acting as liaison between vendors, operation staff, and the CFO for all major projects.
